title: Researchers extend the life of reusable batteries
description: Researchers have developed a charging method that may extend the useful life of reusable batteries. The method carefully changes the electrical current during charging. Longer battery life could reduce waste and operating costs.
text: Researchers have developed a charging method that may extend the useful life of reusable batteries. The method carefully changes the electrical current during charging. Longer battery life could reduce waste and operating costs.
